creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Whatever you are presenting or arguing, the log clearly shows on line 121 that NO_CACHE_DEPEND is in effect and further down (between ll. 178 and 214ff) that ccache is _not_ installed as a requisite port, and that's all we need to know here.

It is also untrue that "the last 
few lines of desktop-make.conf (which are commented out) pertain to lang/gcc48". 

While the gcc48 stuff is commented out, that does not prevent ll. 119...122 to be parsed, and it's not inside some .if...endif block:

    98  [00:00:01] #### /usr/local/etc/poudriere.d/desktop-make.conf ####
    99  [00:00:01] WITH_MANCOMPRESS=YES
...
   113  [00:00:01] #.if (!empty(.CURDIR:M/usr/ports/lang/gcc48) || !empty(.CURDIR:M/var/ports/usr/ports/lang/gcc48) )
   114  [00:00:01] #MAXTHREADS=16
   115  [00:00:01] #CPUTYPE=
   116  [00:00:01] #TARGET_CPU_ARCH=
   117  [00:00:01] #.endif
   118  [00:00:01] 
   119  [00:00:01] WITH_CCACHE_BUILD=yes
   120  [00:00:01] CCACHE_DIR=/root/.ccache
   121  [00:00:01] NO_CCACHE_DEPEND=1
   122  [00:00:01] CCACHE_WRAPPER_PATH= /ccache/libexec/ccache
   123  [00:00:01] #### /usr/ports/Mk/Scripts/ports_env.sh ####
   124  [00:00:01] _CCVERSION_921dbbb2=FreeBSD clang version 11.0.1 (git@github.com:llvm/llvm-project.git llvmorg-11.0.1-0-g43ff75f2c3fe) Target: x86_64-unknown-freebsd13.0 Thread model: posix InstalledDir: /usr/bin
...


I have yet to see answers to my questions and suggested solution. 
We are wasting time.

I am not going to spend further time on this. 

Please refrain from reopening the bug unless you can substantiate this is really a port bug rather than the configuration error I have shown and pointed out.
